ops.title: daemonkit: extract fusekit daemon lifecycle for shared use
ops.description:
User decision 2026-07-17 ("version fix now, daemonkit later"): the immediate stale-daemon gotcha in cc-orchestrate was fixed by making dev-build versions trustworthy (`buildVersion()` → `9999.<mtime>.0-dev`) so cc-interact's existing newest-wins eviction fires. The fuller fusekit-style daemon lifecycle remains to extract into a shared `daemonkit` module:

- fusekit's holder-side self-retire: 60s skew poll, lease-gated drain, exit(0), launchd KeepAlive relaunch, strike ladder.
- Extraction-clean generic packages identified in fusekit: `service`, `proc.Spawn`/`SingleEntrant`/`Strikes`.
- Design the retirer around Gate/Drain interfaces so fusekit, cc-interact, and cc-orchestrate can all consume it.

Scope: a new repo/module (or a cc-interact subpackage — decide at kickoff), fusekit migrated to consume it, cc-interact's daemon.Launcher/evictHolder optionally rebased on it.
